creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I'm using since a couple of weeks now the most recent driver and since a couple of months, I do use the most recent drivers (even if not officially supported by the ports tree). The problem has gone since summer 2016. I think it was a short term problem and I could not fathom whether it has been the driver causing the problems or the fact that only one fan was active while the other fan was inactive. Under load, the second fan - and that was the one residing directly atop the GPU chip itself - did not start and so the already rotating fan had to perform all the duties.

This vanished. Date and time unknown, nor do I know the version number of the driver it vanished with.
